goals.title: Execute the decision-complete Recova MCP lab deployment plan in .omo/...
goals.objective: Execute the decision-complete Recova MCP lab deployment plan in .omo/plans/recova-mcp-deployment.md. Outcome: a debt-only MCP lab at https://mcp-lab.recova.slit.company/mcp on VPS/VM Docker+Caddy, Supabase dev@slit.company as redacted experiment memory, Cloudflare/GoDaddy DNS verified, bold judgment traces captured, generic TrustGraph public tools blocked, execution actions closed, and all evidence recorded under .omo/evidence/recova-mcp-deployment/. Tier HEAVY because this includes external integration, auth, DNS, DB schema, deployment, and public MCP surface.

goals.objective: Execute the decision-complete Recova MCP lab deployment plan in .omo/plans/recova-mcp-deployment.md. Outcome: a debt-only MCP lab at https://mcp-lab.recova.slit.company/mcp on VPS/VM Docker+Caddy, Supabase dev@slit.company as redacted experiment memory, Cloudflare/GoDaddy DNS verified, bold judgment traces captured, generic TrustGraph public tools blocked, execution actions closed, and all evidence recorded under .omo/evidence/recova-mcp-deployment/.
